summary: Shopping cart application with item management and cart summary functionality
known_issues: Cart summary displaying incorrect item count or total

existing_features.title: Debug and fix the CartSummary component to correctly display the item count and total price when cart items are present

new_feature_requests.summary: Verify that the useCart hook correctly manages cart state and provides accurate data to the CartSummary component
Ensure CartItemRow components correctly pass pricing and quantity data that feeds into the cart summary calculations
